source_pr.title: *: replace compareDatum by compare and fix wrong optimize order by
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: wjhuang2016 <huangwenjun1997@gmail.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #30271.  Related to #29867.

Problem Summary:
1. replace compareDatum by compare
2. isSameValue may use wrong collation

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
fix a bug when reducing order by clause for the index which leads to the wrong result.
```

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select * from t where (a>'a' and b='a') or (b = 'A' and a < 'd') order by a,c;").Check(testkit.Rows("'b' 'a' '1'", "'b', 'A', '2'", "'c', 'a', '3'")) (planner/core/integration_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select * from t where (a>'a' and b='a') or (b = 'A' and a < 'd') order by a,c;").Check(testkit.Rows("'b' 'a' '1'", "'b', 'A', '2'", "'c', 'a', '3'")) (planner/core/integration_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: tk.MustQuery("select * from t where (a>'a' and b='a') or (b = 'A' and a < 'd') order by a,c;").Check(testkit.Rows("'b' 'a' '1'", "'b', 'A', '2'", "'c', 'a', '3'")) (planner/core/integration_test.go).
fix_pattern: tk.MustQuery("select * from t where (a>'a' and b='a') or (b = 'A' and a < 'd') order by a,c;").Check(testkit.Rows("'b' 'a' '1'", "'b', 'A', '2'", "'c', 'a', '3'")) (planner/core/integration_test.go)

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select * from t where (a>'a' and b='a') or (b = 'A' and a < 'd') order by a,c;").Check(testkit.Rows("'b' 'a' '1'", "'b', 'A', '2'", "'c', 'a', '3'")) (planner/core/integration_test.go)
files: planner/core/integration_test.go, types/datum.go, types/datum_test.go, util/ranger/detacher.go, util/rowDecoder/decoder_test.go
